chapter_title.en: Chapter on Endowments, Charity, and Gifts

text: 5584 - وَ رَوَى عَلِيُّ بْنُ أَسْبَاطٍ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ حُمْرَانَ عَنْ زُرَارَةَ عَنْ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : فِي اَلرَّجُلِ يَتَصَدَّقُ بِالصَّدَقَةِ اَلْمُشْتَرَكَةِ قَالَ "جَائِزٌ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.5584 - Ali ibn Asbat narrated from Muhammad ibn Humran from Zurara, who reported from Abu Jafar Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Baqir (as), regarding a man who gives a shared charity (sadaqah mushtarakah).
Imam (as) said: "It is permissible."
